expectations.text: Produces a Markdown review file in the outputs directory with at least 200 lines and sections: executive summary, severity tally, HIGH findings, methodology
expectations.evidence: outputs/SOLENG-653-pas-integration-review.md = 616 lines. Sections present: Executive summary, Severity tally, Findings (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/INFO), Integration-boundary, Test & coverage gaps, Methodology, 4 appendices, Postscript.

expectations.text: Produces 5 reviewer JSON files (subagent-1.json … subagent-5.json) in the outputs/.raw/ directory, all schema-valid
expectations.evidence: outputs/.raw/subagent-{1..5}.json all present and pass strict schema validation. Counts: R1=16, R2=15, R3=14, R4=15, R5=16, plus R0=5 (leader backfill).
outputs/.raw/_consolidated.json exists. Per the agent's summary: 50 clusters from 81 raw findings.

expectations.text: Produces _verification_notes.md with consolidator adjudications for HIGH and disputed findings
expectations.evidence: outputs/.raw/_verification_notes.md exists. Methodology section confirms consolidator split 3 mega-clusters, rejected 1 critical, downgraded 3 mediums.

expectations.text: Produces _context.md with ticket metadata, scope list, dep surface, and finding schema
expectations.evidence: outputs/.raw/_context.md exists. Built from Linear MCP fetch of SOLENG-653 + Notion MCP fetches for Hadron Blueprint and PAS Modules pages.

expectations.text: Every HIGH finding in the final review has a literal code evidence quote (not paraphrased)
expectations.evidence: H-1 (the only HIGH) is on Move.toml:6-8 with quoted lines `pas = { git = ..., rev = "main" }` and `ptb = { ... rev = "main" }`.

expectations.text: Final review has a severity tally table comparing post-verification counts to raw reviewer output
expectations.evidence: Section '## Severity tally (after consolidator verification)' present. Table includes 'Change from raw reviewer output' column documenting 1 critical rejected, 3 mediums downgraded, 2 splits.

expectations.text: All 6 dispatched agents (5 reviewers + 1 consolidator) use the sui-pilot-agent subagent type
expectations.evidence: FAIL by environment limitation, not by skill design. Agent reported: 'Task tool was not available in this runtime — fell back to simulating 5 reviewers + 1 consolidator myself as the orchestrator.' This invalidates the multi-agent dispatch path of the eval; the skill's *prescription* for sui-pilot-agent dispatch is correct, but couldn't be exercised here.

expectations.text: Does not modify any file under /Users/alilloig/workspace/se-hadron/sources/ or scripts/ — outputs go to workspace dir only
expectations.evidence: All outputs under /tmp/move-pr-review-workspace/iteration-1/.../with_skill/outputs/. Repo source tree untouched (verified by ls of source files unchanged from earlier session).

expectations.text: Produces a Markdown review file in the outputs directory with at least 200 lines and sections: executive summary, severity tally, HIGH findings, methodology
expectations.evidence: outputs/REVIEW.md = 487 lines. Sections present: Executive summary, Findings (with HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/INFO subsections), Integration-boundary verification, Coverage matrix, Methodology, Artifacts, Recommended path to merge.

expectations.text: Produces 5 reviewer JSON files (subagent-1.json … subagent-5.json) in the outputs/.raw/ directory, all schema-valid
expectations.evidence: Produced 5 reviewer Markdown files (reviewer-1-move-core.md ... reviewer-5-tests-docs-adversarial.md) in outputs/raw/, NOT JSON. The strict-schema JSON pipeline is a skill-specific contract; without the skill, the agent improvised its own format.
Produced raw/consolidation-notes.md (Markdown, not structured JSON). No clustering algorithm applied.

expectations.text: Produces _verification_notes.md with consolidator adjudications for HIGH and disputed findings
expectations.evidence: Verification adjudications are inlined in REVIEW.md and consolidation-notes.md but not extracted as a separate _verification_notes.md.

expectations.text: Produces _context.md with ticket metadata, scope list, dep surface, and finding schema
expectations.evidence: No standalone context bundle file. PR/ticket metadata is inlined in REVIEW.md.

expectations.text: Every HIGH finding in the final review has a literal code evidence quote (not paraphrased)
expectations.evidence: Manual spot-check of H-1 (pause conflation): includes literal quote from pas_transfer.move. The agent imitated the format from the existing reviews/ baseline it peeked at.

expectations.text: Final review has a severity tally table comparing post-verification counts to raw reviewer output
expectations.evidence: Severity counts present (6 HIGH / 15 MEDIUM / 11 LOW / 5 INFO) but no comparison-to-raw column. The without-skill run didn't track raw vs adjudicated separately.

expectations.text: All 6 dispatched agents (5 reviewers + 1 consolidator) use the sui-pilot-agent subagent type
expectations.evidence: No subagent dispatching at all. Single subagent simulated 5 reviewer 'lenses' sequentially. Same environment limitation as with_skill — but this run also doesn't TRY to use sui-pilot-agent, just imitates the multi-reviewer structure from the user prompt.

expectations.text: Does not modify any file under /Users/alilloig/workspace/se-hadron/sources/ or scripts/ — outputs go to workspace dir only
expectations.evidence: All outputs under /tmp/.../without_skill/outputs/. Repo source untouched. CAVEAT: did READ the existing /Users/alilloig/workspace/se-hadron/reviews/SOLENG-653-pas-integration-review.md as a comparison reference, biasing the baseline UPWARD.
